allow_any_secret.description: Whether to allow any Snowflake secret when accessing the Git repository. This setting is ignored if allowed_authentication_secrets is present.

allowed_authentication_secrets.description: A comma-separated list of fully-qualified Snowflake secret names that UDF or procedure handler code can use when accessing the Git repository.

allowed_api_authentication_integrations.description: A comma-separated list of Snowflake security integration names that UDF or procedure handler code can use when accessing the Git repository. If empty, allow no integrations.
